reason: first successful runtime probe at event 18 precedes named diagnosis at event 22
first_probe_cmd:
export PRIMARY_URL="postgresql://bench:bench@postgres-primary:5432/ledger"
export REPLICA_URL="postgresql://bench:bench@postgres-replica:5432/ledger"

# Create a test account
psql "$PRIMARY_URL" -c "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounts (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, balance_cents BIGINT DEFAULT 0);"
psql "$PRIMARY_URL" -c "DELETE FROM accounts WHERE id = 'test-acct-1';"
psql "$PRIMARY_URL" -c "INSERT INTO accounts (id, balance_cents) VALUES ('test-acct-1', 0);"
